# Chapter 5: Software defects: types of bugs  (~110 pp)
- 5.1 Why software fails differently from hardware (12) · 5.2 Memory-safety bugs (15) · 5.3 Logic and specification bugs (15) · 5.4 Numerical bugs (12) · 5.5 Concurrency bugs (15) · 5.6 Time-related bugs (15) · 5.7 Configuration and environment bugs (12) · 5.8 Failure section (case): Mars Climate Orbiter, Knight Capital, GitHub 24-hour outage 2018 (14)

**Archetype**: failure, scaling. **Project**: deliberately inject five bug classes into one program; design tests that catch each. **Exercises**: 30.
